# NOVA05 (NovaWebStudio)

> NOVA05 is one studio for everything a small business needs online: an embeddable AI chatbot and a vertical AI receptionist that answer visitors 24/7 and capture leads, done-for-you website creation with the AI built in, an AI SEO studio that audits pages and writes content that ranks, and a free QR code studio. One script tag, works on any platform (WordPress, Shopify, Squarespace, Wix, Webflow, Framer, custom code).

## What it is

- **AI Chatbot** — a chat bubble you add with one `<script>` tag. It answers visitor questions in under a second, in your brand voice, using only your own business information (prices, hours, services, policies). When a visitor is interested it captures their name and email as a lead and can draft the follow-up reply.
- **AI Receptionist** — the chatbot configured as a front desk for appointment businesses (dentists, salons, aesthetics clinics, physios, vets, opticians, trades, estate agents): greets visitors, answers from the treatment/price list, qualifies enquiries, and captures the booking request out of hours.
- **Website Creation** — done-for-you business websites designed and built by NovaWebStudio, with the AI receptionist pre-installed and trained, SEO-ready pages, and branded QR codes included.
- **AI SEO Studio** — audits any page for a 0–100 score across ten checks, returns a prioritised action plan with rewritten title and meta description, and includes an AI writer for keywords, metadata and full blog posts.
- **QR Studio** — a free in-browser QR code generator (no signup, no watermark) with brand colors and an optional nova-star centre, for menus, review cards, vans, flyers.

## Who it is for

Small and independent businesses with a website — dentists, salons and clinics, estate agents, gyms and studios, restaurants, accountants, trades, vets — who want to answer customers and capture leads around the clock without hiring.

## Pricing

- Launch — £29/month — 1 chatbot, 500 messages/month
- Grow — £79/month — 3 chatbots, 3,000 messages/month
- Scale — £199/month — 10 chatbots, 15,000 messages/month
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required. Every plan includes the SEO studio.

## Key pages

- Home: https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app/
- AI Chatbot: https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app/chatbot
- AI Receptionist: https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app/receptionist
- Website Creation: https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app/websites
- SEO Studio: https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app/seo
- Free QR Studio: https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app/qr
- Pricing: https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app/pricing

## How it works

1. Sign up and describe your business.
2. Copy one script tag onto your website.
3. The chatbot answers visitors and drops leads into your inbox; the SEO studio audits and improves your pages.

## Contact

NovaWebStudio — https://novawebstudio05.netlify.app
